# Grid

CSS Grid layout component and utilities.

## Import

```jsx
import { Grid, GridItem, SimpleGrid } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Components

### Grid

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| templateColumns | `string` | - | CSS `grid-template-columns` |
| templateRows | `string` | - | CSS `grid-template-rows` |
| gap | `string \| number` | - | Gap between grid items |
| children | `ReactNode` | - | Grid items |

### GridItem

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| colSpan | `number` | - | Number of columns to span |
| rowSpan | `number` | - | Number of rows to span |
| colStart | `number` | - | Column start position |
| colEnd | `number` | - | Column end position |

### SimpleGrid

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| columns | `number \| ResponsiveValue` | - | Number of columns |
| minChildWidth | `string` | - | Minimum width of each child |
| gap | `string \| number` | - | Gap between items |

## Usage

```jsx
<SimpleGrid columns={{ base: 1, md: 2, lg: 3 }} gap={4}>
  <Box>Item 1</Box>
  <Box>Item 2</Box>
  <Box>Item 3</Box>
</SimpleGrid>
```
